    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 45, 'col': 54},
]

for a in actions:

    print(f"Clicked {a}: level_completed={result.get('level_completed')}")
    if result.get('level_completed'):
        break

# Check result
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nStep: {current_frame.step}, Level: {current_frame.level}")
print(f"\nRight side rows 33 and 45:")
print(f"  33: {ascii_lines[33][35:56]}")
print(f"  45: {ascii_lines[45][35:56]}")
